data.title: Two-bedroom apartment reservation — Lekki
data.message: Sharing the property transaction record for the apartment reservation we discussed. Please review the participants, property details, deposit terms, and required documents.

sections.heading: Parties and purpose
sections.body: This Naitrust safe-deal agreement is between you (the Buyer) and Damilola Properties Ltd (the Seller) for the reservation of a two-bedroom apartment in Lekki.

sections.heading: Protected payment
sections.body: The Buyer will fund ₦780,000.00 into a partner-issued virtual account operated by a regulated payment partner. Naitrust never holds the funds directly. Funds remain protected until the release conditions in this agreement are met.

sections.heading: Delivery obligations
sections.body: The Seller must provide the offer letter, unit details, allocation information, and agreed supporting property documents by the stated milestone dates.

sections.heading: Release conditions
sections.body: Completion is recorded when the agreed reservation documents and payment receipt are available and acknowledged by the Buyer in the transaction room.

sections.heading: Disputes
sections.body: Either party may open a dispute in the transaction room before release. While a dispute is open, no release occurs. Disputes are reviewed against the evidence attached to this deal.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By accepting this agreement, both parties confirm the terms above reflect their understanding. Once both parties accept, the agreement is frozen and changes require a new agreed version.

data.title: Developer instalment — Cedar Court Unit C08
data.message: We'd like to run this purchase through Naitrust. Please confirm the terms so we can fund the protected account.

sections.heading: Parties and purpose
sections.body: This safe deal agreement is between Northbridge Supplies Ltd (the Buyer) and you (the Seller) for "Bulk order — 200 office chairs" — a business to business transaction under the Supplier and wholesale orders category.

sections.heading: Protected payment
sections.body: The Buyer will fund ₦1,450,000.00 into a partner-issued virtual account operated by a regulated payment partner. Naitrust never holds the funds directly.

sections.heading: Delivery obligations
sections.body: The Seller must deliver 200 office chairs (model NB-EC200, black mesh) to the Buyer's Ikeja warehouse on or before 2026-08-01, with a signed waybill and stock inspection evidence uploaded to the transaction room.

sections.heading: Release conditions
sections.body: Funds are released to the Seller only when the full quantity is delivered and the Buyer's inspection confirms count and condition, or the auto-confirm window elapses without a dispute.

sections.heading: Disputes
sections.body: Either party may open a dispute in the transaction room before release. While a dispute is open, no release occurs.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By accepting this agreement, both parties confirm the terms above reflect their understanding. Once both parties accept, the agreement is frozen.

sections.heading: Parties and purpose
sections.body: This safe deal agreement is between Kelechi Nwosu (the Buyer) and you (the Seller) for "Event photography — full-day coverage" — a customer to business transaction under the Events and advance bookings category.

sections.heading: Protected payment
sections.body: The Buyer will fund ₦320,000.00 into a partner-issued virtual account operated by a regulated payment partner.

sections.heading: Release conditions
sections.body: Funds are released when the edited gallery is delivered within 14 days of the event and the Buyer confirms receipt in the transaction room.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By accepting this agreement, both parties confirm the terms above reflect their understanding.
